name: io.github.jordanburke/oura-ring-mcp-server
description: Oura Ring MCP server for the Oura API v2: sleep, readiness, activity, heart rate, and more.

environmentVariables.name: OURA_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Oura OAuth2 client ID (register an app at https://cloud.ouraring.com/oauth/applications, then run `oura-ring-mcp-server login` once to authorize)

environmentVariables.name: OURA_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Oura OAuth2 client secret from the same application

environmentVariables.name: OURA_SANDBOX
environmentVariables.description: Use Oura's /sandbox/ demo data instead of real data (true/false, default false)

environmentVariables.name: OURA_TELEMETRY_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Write NDJSON telemetry events to this file path (safe under any transport)

environmentVariables.name: OURA_TELEMETRY_CONSOLE
environmentVariables.description: Console telemetry under httpStream transport: true (default) or false
